title: pilosella caespitosa var. suecica
intro: Pilosella caespitosa var. suecica, also known as Devil's BITCH or false Sow Thistle, is a perennial plant species within the sunflower family, native to Europe and parts of Asia. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Pilosella caespitosa var. suecica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve drying and infusing its leaves and flowers in hot water to create teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
